WebLink.url: {! IF( OR(LEN($Site.Name) == 0, ISBLANK($Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c)), URLFOR($Site.BaseUrl & "/apex/sugati__CheckMargin?Id=" & Opportunity.Id + "&u=" & URLFOR($Site.BaseUrl & "/apex/sugati__ItineraryPDF") & "?id=" & Opportunity.Id & "&isdtp=p1"), URLFOR($Site.Prefix & $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c & URLENCODE('/apex/sugati__CheckMargin?Id=') + Opportunity.Id + "&u=/apex/sugati__ItineraryPDF?id=" + Opportunity.Id) ) }
